lg.l: tāla kramuka kadaṁba kuravaka kadaḷi kharjūra

body.div:
eraḍaneya saṁdhi halavu nayanītiyali haṁseya kaḷuhalaṁdina rāyabhāradi naḷanr̥page satiyādaḷā damayaṁti manavolidu
kēḷu kuṁtītanaya bhīmanr̥
pālatanujege viraha balidu vi
śālavāgiralitta kēḷai niṣadhanagariyanu
pālisuva naḷacakravartiyu
mēlenipa sabheyalli ratnada
sāluhoḷahina siṁhapīṭhadoḷesedu kuḷḷirda
gauḷa vaṁga kaḷiṁga kuṁtaḷa
cōḷa barbara siṁdhu kēraḷa
lāḷa magadha varāḷa saurāṣṭrādi bhūmipara
bāḷeyara maṁtrigaḷa vīrabha
ṭāḷi naṭa gāyakara kavigaḷa
jāla saṁdōhadali meredudu nr̥patiyāsthāna
ā samayadali baṁdanallige
dēśayātrika bhūsuranoḷava
nīśa kēḷidaniḷeyoḷēnuṁṭati vicitravene
bhūsurōttamaneṁdanele dhara
ṇīśa kēḷu vidarbhanagarado
ḷēsu puṇyōdayadi paḍedano bhīmanr̥pa suteya
avaḷa rūpaguṇātiśayagaḷa
nevage baṇṇisalaḷave kēḷā
yuvati lōkada satiya bageyaṁtalla bhāvisalu
pravimalākāradali mr̥dutara
savinuḍiya saṁbhāṣaṇegaḷali
bhuvanadoḷu nākāṇe damayaṁtige samānaranu
muraharana nijasoseya rūpaṁ
tirali caṁdrana magaḷa celuvaṁ
tirali mainākana sahōdariyaṁdavaṁtirali
śaradhitanujeya sauṁdariyavanu
marasiteṁbudu lōkadoḷagā
sarasijākṣiya bagege sariyillarasa kēḷeṁda
misuniyōleya ḍhāḷa kadapino
ḷeseye mēludu jāre kucabhara
kusiye naḍuvallāḍe masagida maṁdahāsadali
eseva sōrmuḍi bhāradali bā
gisida koraḷina kaiya vīṇeya
bisaruhākṣiya sobaga baṇṇisalariye nāneṁda
hēḷutire nuḍinuḍige meccuta
kēḷi taledūgidanu naiṣadha
nāligaḷige sarōjamukhi gōcarisidaṁtāge
bālikeya mōhisida puṣpaśa
rāḷiyali mananoṁdu śiva śiva
lōlalōcaneyeṁtu tanagahaḷenuta ciṁtisida
vanite guṇagaḷoḷoṁdanoṁdanu
manadoḷage savimāḍi taruṇiya
nenedu hoṁpuḷivōgi virahadi madanagīḍāgi
ghanavirahadali kāyakuṁdida
janapa naḷanire bēṁṭekārara
jananivahadiṁ baṁdarā samayadali vanacararu
baṁdu phalavastugaḷa kāṇike
yiṁda kaimugidarasa mr̥gaghana
viṁdu bēṁṭege gamisabēkene nr̥pati nasunaguta
iṁdu virahava kaḷevaḍidu lē
seṁdu śabarara kaḷuhiyōlaga
diṁdalaramanegeydalastāṁbudhiyoḷinaniḷida
naḷinasakhanudayadali naḷanr̥pa
tilaka karesida sakaḷadaḷavanu
hoḷeva khaḍgakaṭhāri modalādakhiḷa kaidugaḷa
balubhaṭaru bēṁṭeyali nānā
balegaḷaṁṭina kōlu kaṇṇiya
calayutaru saṁdaṇisi meredudu purada bāheyali
arasa kēḷ śaśikulaśirōmaṇi
dharisidanu navaratunamayadā
bharaṇagaḷa divyāṁbarādi sugaṁdhalēpadali
tarisiyērida vāyuvēgada
turagavanu saṁdaṇisi mōhara
teraḷitagaṇita vādyadali nela biriyalaitaṁda
ēna hēḷuvenarasa hokkaru
kānanava baḷasidaru mr̥gatati
yānalāpude tegedu hāydudu bhaṭara ghallaṇege
ānegaḷa keḍahidaru balasaṁ
dhānadali huli karaḍi musu mola
vānarādi samasta mr̥gagaḷa tarubi keḍahidaru
hatti tadgiriśikharavanu mara
mottadali balegaḷanu hāykida
rotti sōhidaroṁdu ghanatara si0havabbarisi
hotta kōpadi sainyavanu muri
dotti barutire kaṁḍu nr̥pa beṁ
batti kaḍidanu mr̥gapatiya vanavella beragāge
nilisi bēṁṭeyanalli baḷalida
balasamētadi baṁdu tatpura
vaḷayadudyānavanu hokkanu balida virahadali
nalavu hiṁgida manada duguḍado
ḷiḷidu toḷedanu jānujaṁgheya
koḷadi parihr̥tanāgi saṁcarisidanu vanadoḷage
ā koḷada tīradali tarugaḷa
nēkavadaroḷagoṁdu ṭhāvino
ḷēkavr̥kṣada neḷalinali navakusumadikkeyali
ā kamalajanaturaga nidrā
vyākuladi malagiralu ka0ḍa śu
bhākarōnnata śubhratējada rājahaṁsavanu
aruṇamayadānanada padayuga
garigaḷunnatadhavaḷa dēhada
paramatējadoḷeseva haṁseya kaṁḍu beragāgi
haraharā! idarāyatava mura
haranu tānē ballanenuta
kkaradi mellane karava nīḍuta piḍida haṁsavanu
odari kuṇiyalu hastadoḷagada
kadaladaṁtire piḍiyalarasana
vadanakamalava nōḍi hedaritu bahaḷa bhītiyali
hr̥daya karaguva mātaneṁdudu
madakarige norajaṁtarave kai
sadaradavaranu koluvudēnarideṁdudā pakṣi
karigaḷanu muridiḍuva siṁhake
narigaḷidirē tānu ninagaṁ
tarave sākaṁtirali kaṁḍavarella kaḍunagare
aribhayaṁkara śatrugaḷa saṁ
harisuvudu nr̥panīti ninagidu
tarave biḍu parahiṁse dōṣavideṁdudā pakṣi
baḍabagautaṇavikkuvaḍeyo
kkuḍite hālē maṁju suriya
lkoḍane kere tuṁbuvude nr̥pa nīnenna bhuṁjisalu
oḍaligāpyāyanave kēḷele
poḍavipati biḍu nanna maneyali
maḍadi sutarummaḷava nōḍeṁdoralitā pakṣi
marana huttavanēridara saṁ
garadi dainyaṁbaḍuvarāyudha
murida barigaiyavara nīroḷu hokku niṁdavara
taruṇiyara maregoṁḍavara ni
bbaradi muridōḍuvara nidrā
bharadoḷirdara koluvuducitaveyeṁdudā pakṣi
nuḍige nācidanarasa haṁsada
naḍavaḷige meccidanu ninnanu
hiḍidu koluvavanalla ninnālayake hōgeṁdu
biḍalu rekkeya koḍahi hāritu
voḍane maraḷitu dharege rāyana
kaḍege maṁḍisi kuḷitu nuḍidudu nr̥page vinayadali
bhūramaṇa kēḷasuva kāydupa
kāramāḍide nīnu ninagupa
kāramāḍuvenenaladēneṁdarasa besagoṁḍa
sārahr̥dayane cittavisu vi
stāradiṁdaruhuvenu bhuvanado
ḷāriguṁṭē paramasukr̥tagaḷeṁdudā pakṣi
arasa kēḷatidūradali sura
purava pōlva vidarbhapaṭṭaṇa
darasu bhīmanr̥pālanātana tanuje damayaṁti
parama puṇyāṁgane mahāsuṁ
dari nipuṇe gajagamane nayaguṇa
bharite sobagina sōne tānihaḷalli vanajākṣi
pogaḷalaḷavē satiya celuvina
bageya bhāvisi nōḍalati sō
jigavu nere damayaṁti yauvanarūparēkheyali
nagemogada poṁbogara miṁcina
bogasegaṁgaḷa seḷenaḍuva se
ḷḷugura beḍagina kāṁte raṁjisutirpaḷā puradi
kṣitiyoḷiha satiyaraliyamarā
vatiyoḷiha peṇgaḷali mēṇā
vitaḷadalliha nāriyarallīkṣisidaḍā satige
pratiya kāṇenu rūpinali nī
nati celuva ninagavaḷu pāsaṭi
satige nīnē ramaṇanallade kāṇenitararanu
āvaḷu ninagolivaṁte māḍuve
śivana kr̥pe ninaguṁṭu nammali
savaḍinuḍiyillarasa naṁbuvudenna nīnenalu
avanipati nasunaguta haṁseya
savinuḍige manasōtu virahada
tavakadali hēvarisi nuḍidanu nr̥pati khagapatige
manasijana śarahatige noṁdenu
tanuva sairisalārenenagā
vaniteyanu sērisuta salahennasuva karuṇadali
enage nīnē paramabāṁdhava
manake haruṣava māḍu nīnī
banake baha pariyaṁta tānillihenu hōgeṁda
kēḷu dharmaja naḷanr̥pālana
bīḷukoṁḍu sarāgadiṁda va
nālayava horavaṁṭu teraḷitu vāyuvēgadali
ā latāṁgiya patiya kīrti vi
śālavāda0dadali rājama
rāḷa gaganake hāydu kaṁḍiḷitaṁdudā purake
kanakamaṇi nirmitada saudhadi
jananikara saṁdōhadaliyupa
vanada vīdigaḷesedu mereva vidarbha paṭṭaṇake
manavolidu nijabaḷaga sahitaṁ
ganeyarōlagadalli madanana
moneyalaginali baḷalva satiyanu kaṁḍudā haṁse
nīlamaṇibhittigaḷa vajrada
sālugaṁbada pacce halageya
mēle muttina lōve havaḷadi kaḍeda bōdigeya
sāla maṇimaṁṭapadi maṁcada
mēle maṁḍisi naḷana ciṁteya
tāḷida0gane satiyaroḍanire kaṁḍudā haṁse
perenosala katturiya tilakada
koraḷa muttina hāra ratnada
beraḷa mudrikegaḷa suvarṇada karada kaṁkaṇada
paripariya niriyuḍigegaḷa nū
purada toḍarina dēsi mige baḷa
siralu taruṇiyara0du satiyanu kaṁḍudā ha0sa
taḷita mēghadi hoḷeva miṁcina
baḷagavene haṁsagaḷu nabhadiṁ
diḷegiḷidu satiyara sabhāmaṁḍaladi kuḷḷiralu
naḷinalōcane kaṁḍu pakṣiya
lalaneyara moga nōḍi haṁsada
celuva baṇṇisi hiḍiyabēkeṁdenuta gamanisidaḷu
mellamellane aḍiyiḍuta kara
pallavava cācidaḷu nūpura
ghallughalirene attalittalu sārutā haṁse
nillada0gaisutta barala
llalli eḍaritu kusumamaya nava
malligeya banadalli hokkudu hodara hosameḷeya
keḷadiyara kelakotti tānē
meḷeya hokkaḷu bāge seḷenaḍu
baḷuke kucabhāradali mēludu jāre muḍi cadare
jalajamukhi bemariḍalu koraḷina
lalitadēkāvaḷigaḷallā
ḍalu seraganaḷavaḍisi niṁdaḷu baḷali bisusuydu
ele sarōruhagaṁdhi nīnena
golidu manadali hiḍiveneṁbī
chalavidētake māṇu nāvaṁbarada pakṣigaḷu
nilukuvavarāvalla baridē
baḷaladiru tā baṁda pariyanu
tiḷuhuvenu ninagellavanu kēḷeṁdudā pakṣi
naḷinamukhi naḷacakravartiya
baḷiya vāhanavāgi tānihe
nolidu salahuvanenna paramaprītivacanadali
iḷege naḷakūbara jayaṁtara
celuva madanana rūparēkheya
haḷivudā naḷanr̥pana nijasauṁdaryadāṭōpa
ninna rūpige saluvudau naḷa
nunnatada sauṁdarya jagadoḷa
ginnu nā sarigāṇe nimagīrvarige samanahudu
ennalā nuḍigēḷi haṁsege
tanna śiravanu bāgi guṇasaṁ
panne nuḍidaḷu nāci nasunageyiṁda vinayadali
paramaguṇanidhi pakṣi kēḷ‍ bā
hiranu pātaki madananele ni
ṣṭhuradoḷeseyalu puṣpabāṇadi noṁdudennoḍalu
karuṇarasadhāreyali tāpava
pariharisabēkeṁdu nīnā
dharaṇipati naḷanr̥page binnaiseṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
parara duḥkhava pariharisi mige
pararigupakārārthavesagalu
paramapuṇyavideṁdu pēḷvaru piriyarādavaru
paramabāṁdhava nīnenage sa
tkarisu virahadi noṁdavaḷa kara
karege guri māḍadiru salaheṁdaḷu sarōjamukhi
balida virahāgniyali noṁdenu
baḷalidenu tanu bāḍi tāpadi
nalavu hiṁgitu bavaṇe heccitu trāṇaveḷadāytu
halavu mātēninnu naḷanr̥pa
tilakanennaya patiyalā bhū
taḷada puruṣaru pitana sama kēḷeṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
arasa kēḷā haṁsa taruṇiya
karuṇadaḷateya kaṁḍu tā baṁ
diruva kāryada hadanu lēsāyteṁdu manadoḷage
haruṣa mige koṁḍāḍi satiyanu
karedu nuḍidudu ninage naḷabhū
varana patiyanu māḷpenaṁjadireṁdudā haṁse
aṁtaraṁgada buddhiyanu dama
yaṁtigellavanaruhi taruṇiya
saṁtaviṭṭalliṁda kaḷuhisikoṁḍu bēgadali
muṁtaḷardu mige tanna bāṁdhava
saṁtatiyanoḍagoṁḍu niṣadhana
ciṁteyanu pariharisabēkeṁdaiditā haṁse
āga naḷabhūvarana dakṣiṇa
bhāga bhujanayanaṁgaḷaduridu
vāga kēḷidanidara phalavēneṁdu bhūsurara
bhōgasukhadarśanada phalaviṁ
dīgalahudenalā samayadi sa
rāgadali naḍetaṁdudā nr̥paneḍege kalahaṁse
baṁda haṁseya kaṁḍu mukhakaḷe
yiṁdalaridanu nr̥pati manadali
yiṁdumukhi tanagolida hadanahudeṁdu haruṣadali
maṁdagamaneya kaṁḍirē ē
neṁdu nuḍidaḷu satiya bageyē
neṁdu kēḷalu nr̥page baḷikiṁteṁdudā pakṣi
mānavādhipa kēḷu manadanu
mānavanu biḍu guḍiya kaṭṭisu
nīneḷasidiṣṭārthaphala siddhisidudinnēnu?
mānanidhi nī munna māḍida
nūna sukr̥tada phalavo ninnane
dhyānisuvaḷanavarata mana bērillavā satige
ā taḷōdari ninna mēlaṇa
prītiyiṁdolidaṁtaraṁgadi
kātarisutihaḷaṁgajana upaṭaḷadi kaḍunoṁdu
dhātuguṁdihaḷā taruṇi mana
sōtu haṁbalisuvaḷu naḷanr̥pa
nātanē patiyeṁdu naṁbiheneṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
ele nr̥pati damaya0tiyanu nina
golisi baṁdenu bhāṣe saṁdudu
lalaneyanu nī maduveyāgiṁdenna kaḷuhenalu
baḷalidiri namagōsugave balu
haḷuvadali toḷalidiri kaṣṭava
baḷasidiri sākinnu gamanisiyeṁdu bīḷkoṭṭa
kēḷu pāṁḍavatanaya rājama
rāḷa teraḷidudatta naḷabhū
pālanittalu baṁdu hokkanu tanna nagariyanu
āḷumaṁdiya kaḷuhi manadi vi
śālavirahada tāpadali mige
kēḷamēḷa vinōdavibhavavanuḷidanā nr̥pati
attalā damayaṁti naḷanoḷu
cittaviṭṭaḷu nr̥page virahavu
hottitākeya mēleyirvarigāytu saṁtāpa
cittajanu pātakanu virahava
hottisidanibbarige madanana
hettavanu varapurada cennigarāya karuṇisida

mūraneya saṁdhi rājisuva varabhīmapuradali rāja naḷanr̥pa maduveyāgi sa rājatējadi baṁdu hokkanu purava satisahita
kēḷu dharmaja naḷana rūpanu
kēḷalī hadanāytu satige nr̥
pālanaṁgavu gōcarisaleṁtahudo virahāgni
nālagege dravavilla maṁcada
mēle malagaḷu balidavastheya
hēḷalinnēnarasa damayaṁtiya manōvyatheya
lalane nidrāṁganeyanuḷidaḷu
holabudappida manadi satiyaru
suḷiye naḷanr̥pa baṁdanideyeṁdenuta kaḷavaḷisi
niluki nōḍuvaḷomme kāṇade
halubuvaḷu mattomme kaṁḍada
keḷadiyaru tammoḷage tāvālōcisidaralli
viraha balidudu satige nāvida
narasagaruhuveveṁdu keḷadiya
rirade baṁdaru bhīmanr̥pagiṁteṁdarī hadana
varakavigaḷaṁdinali dharaṇī
śvarana kaivārisalu kēḷidu
taruṇi virahake tanuva tettihaḷeṁdarabaleyaru
kēḷidanu nasunaguta bhīmanr̥
pāla tannātmajeya yauvana
dēḷigeyanālisuta varanāreṁdu ciṁteyali
ōlagake naḍetaṁdu baresida
nōlegaḷa kaḷuhisidanu dharaṇī
pālakara barahēḷenuta hoyisidanu ḍaṁgurava
haridararasāḷugaḷu dikkuga
ḷarasugaḷa nagaravanu ittalu
purava śr̥ṁgarisidaru bhīmanr̥pālanājñeyali
tarisidaru bhaṁḍāradali nava
bharitavāda suvastugaḷa vi
starisi kaṭṭidaragaladali vaivāhamaṁṭapava
hoḷeva daṁtada kaṁbagaḷa pu
ttaḷiya sālina mēlukaṭṭina
taḷira tōraṇadōraṇada lōvegaḷa araḷeleya
biḷiya muttina sarada pavaḷada
biḷiya cauriya mēlugaṭṭina
hoḷahu mige racisidaru satiya vivāhamaṁṭapava
ōraṇada bīdigaḷa sādina
sāraṇeya katturiya mige pa
nnīra caḷeyada parimaḷada kuṁkumada kāraṇeya
tōraṇada taḷigegaḷa ghanasiṁ
gāraveseyuva kērikēriya
vāranāriyariṁda saṁdaṇisitu vidarbhapura
māḷavāṁdhra kaḷiṁga kōsala
cōḷa matsya varāḷa koṁkaṇa
gauḷa kuṁtaḷa magadha barbara pāṁḍya karṇāṭa
lāḷa vaṁga surāṣṭra kuru nē
pāḷa ghūrjara siṁdhu maru pā0
cāḷa modalādakhiḷa dharaṇīpālaraididaru
dharaṇivalaya digaṁtadavanī
śvararu bhūsura siddha vidyā
dhararu sujanaru malla sacivaru makuṭavardhanaru
paramar̥ṣigaḷu paṁḍitaru kavi
vararu naṭa gāyakaru vidyā
dhararu daivajñarugaḷagaṇitarāgi neredudu rāya kēḷeṁda
ā samayadali nāradanu hari
vāsudēvāyeṁba vīṇeya
bhāsurada karagaḷali nuḍisuta munigaḷogginali
vāsavana sabhegaitaralu saṁ
tōṣadiṁdidireddu ghanasiṁ
hāsanadi kuḷḷirisi kaimugideṁdanamarēṁdra
ettaṇiṁdaitaṁdirurviyo
ḷuttamaru dharaṇīśarali nere
satyadharma suśīlarāruṁṭalli guṇavēnu
cittavisi munināthayenagada
bittarisi pēḷenalu suramuni
cittadali nasunaguta nuḍidanu pākaśāsanage
amarapati kēḷavaniyali bhū
ramaṇaruṁṭu anēkavavaroḷu
nimage pēḷve vidarbhapurapati bhīmanr̥patanuje
kamalamukhi damayaṁtigevvana
samataḷise cittadi svayaṁvara
kamitabala nr̥paraidi barutire dharaṇiyagaladali
alli nereda samasta dharaṇī
vallabharanēneṁbe paṭṭaṇa
vella neredudu dēśadēśāṁtarada yācakaru
nilladaitarutire vivāhava
nalli nōḍuvevenuta muni kara
pallavada vīṇeyali haṁsavanēri horavaṁṭu
arasa kēḷamarēṁdranā muni
varana vacanava kēḷi heccida
virahadali karesidanu satiyarigeṁdanī hadana
paramasati damayaṁtiyaḷanupa
cariyadali yenagoliye māḍeṁ
durutarada vastugaḷanittabaleyara bīḷkoṭṭa
tarisiyērida divyarathavanu
karesidanu yama varuṇa vāya
vyaru sahita horavaṁṭanamarāvatiyanamarēṁdra
dharegiḷidu bare muṁde mārgadi
smarana rūpina naiṣadhana kaṁ
ḍaru manōrāgadali kāṇisikoṁḍarucitadali
naḷinamitrana tējadavoliḷe
giḷiva mahimara kaṁḍu rathadiṁ
diḷegiḷidu bhaktiyali naḷa kai mugidu niṁdiralu
taḷita haruṣānaṁdadali bara
seḷedu bigiyappidaru rāyana
celuvanīkṣisi nalidu koṁḍāḍidaru manavolidu

narasi kāṇade bayalanappuva
ḷuravaṇipa kaṇṇīrinali naḍeta0daḷiṁdumukhi
arasa kēḷāścaryavanu sati
barutiralu kānanadi nerediha
maruḷu baḷagavu bhūtabētāḷagaḷu tolagiduvu
śarabha mola kāḍāne siṁhaga
ḷirade jāriduvalli satiyaḷa
paramapātivratyamahimege nr̥pati kēḷeṁda
muṁde kaṁḍaḷu hoḷeva tāpasa
vr̥ṁdavanu kaṇṇīra surisuta
baṁdavaḷanure kēḷidaru munivararu karuṇadali
iṁdumukhi nīnāru illige
baṁda hadanēnenalu śōkadi
noṁdu nuḍidaḷu munigaḷige kai mugidu vinayadali
ēnaneṁbenu tanna puṇyada
hāniyanu cittavisi karuṇadi
mānanidhigaḷu ballirē naḷacakravartiyanu
ā narēṁdrana maḍadi tā mu
nnēna nōṁteno patiyagali ghana
kānanake guriyādeneṁdaḷu taruṇi bisusuydu
bhūtaḷava naḷanr̥pati dyūtadi
sōtu puṣkaragittu satyada
nīti tappade baṁdu banadali tannanagalidanu
dhātuguṁdade patiya kāṇade
bhītiyali nimmaḍiya kaṁḍenu
bhūtadaye nimaguṁṭalā salaheṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
nenedudaṁtaḥkaraṇa kēḷuta
munigaḷeṁdaru tāye śōkadi
kanali kaṁgeḍabēḍa nijapatirājyasirisutaru
ninage baṁdaparinnu yōgada
manadalaridevu nāvu aṁjadi
renuta pēḷiyadr̥śyavādaru munigaḷogginali
ā taruṇi beragāgi kanasina
rītiyāytakaṭakaṭa mauni
vrātavettalu saridudō vismayavalāyenuta
ā taḷōdari patiya kāṇade
kāturadi barutiralu kaṁḍaru
nūtanada bēhārigaḷu toḷaluva nitaṁbiniya
ārivaḷu vanalakṣmiyō sura
nāriyō mārāṁganeyo mada
nārisatiyō sarasatiyo mēṇasuramāniniyo
āra vaniteyo māyarūpina
bhūribhūtavo tiḷiyalaridiva
ḷārenuta bhayagoṁḍu ōḍidaralli baṇajigaru
nōḍidaḷu damayaṁti bhītiya
lōḍutiha bīḍikeya vaiśyara
hēḍitanavanu kaṁḍu nasunagutalligaitaṁdu
ōḍalētake nimage upahati
māḍuvaḷu tānalla jagakati
rūḍhisida naḷanr̥pana sati tāneṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
vīrasēnana tanaya naḷanr̥pa
dhāriṇiyanure sōtu kāryada
kāraṇadi naḍetaṁdanaḍavige tannanagalidanu
dāridappidenilli nimmanu
sēridenu paradēśi tanagoṁ
dūra tōrire nīvenuta tuṁbidaḷu kaṁbaniya
tāye nimma padābjadarśana
vāyitemagiṁdinali dhanyaru
īyavasthege taṁdudē vidhi nimmanenuteragi
nōyadiriyide caidyapuraveṁ
dā yuvatiyoḍagoṁḍu barutire
tōyajāptanu pascimāṁbudhigiḷidanolavinali
hagalu savedudu hoṁbisilu nere
degedudativēgadali kattale
bigidudavanītaḷava peṭṭige muccidaṁdadali
suguṇe damayaṁtiyaḷa nōḍalu
sogasi baṁdanimiṣaravōl tā
regaḷu mūḍiduvaṁbaradi prajvalipa kāṁtiyali
avanipati kēḷ vaiśyakulasaṁ
bhavaru hāykidaralli gūḍā
ravanu biṭṭaru pāḷeyava malagidaru rātriyali
avadhi baṁdudanēnaneṁbenu
kavidu kāḍānegaḷu maḍuvige
tavakadiṁ nīraḍisi baṁdudu sirigaḷa0dadali
muridu tarugaḷaniḍuta meḷegaḷa
norasi meṭṭuta kōḍinali balu
moraḍigaḷa kittiḍuta soṁḍila tūgi madavēri
karigaḷaitare kaṁḍu bhītiyo
ḷirade hāydaru kelavaru dhairyado
ḷurubi niṁdaru sabaḷadali hokkiridu kādidaru
tūḷiduvu madakarigaḷavaranu
sīḷi hāyduvu kelara mummone
yāḷu kavidudu hokku kādidaratuḷabhujabalaru
tāḷaballare kelaru karigaḷa
dāḷigidirē muridu hāydaru
hēḷalēnadanarasa tegedōḍidaru desedesege
taraharisi nilalaridu karigaḷa
urubu ghanapiṭṭaṇisi kolutide
haraṇavanu hōgāḍalēkeṁduḷida paṭubhaṭaru
teraḷitalliyadalli vāṇi
jyaru muridu bare kāṇitā vai
śyarigadhipa ciṁtisida hadanēneṁdu manadoḷage
amma kēḷī madagajaṁgaḷu
namma kolutive hadana kāṇenu
nammanē nere naṁbi baṁdiri idake gatiyēnu
nimmanillige taṁdudē vidhi
bommabarehava mīruvavarā
rammalōkadoḷeṁdu marugida vaiśyakulatilaka
jananavē varabhīmarāyana
maneyoḷage naḷacakravartiye
iniyanaggada vīrasēnane māvanāgiralu
vanadoḷibhakarigaḷige tā nija
tanuva terabēkeṁba kāraṇa
tanagiralu nīvēna māḍuvireṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
enuta kaṇṇeve bigidu manadali
nenedaḷacyutanaṁghrikamalava
vanajanābha mukuṁda salahene karigaḷākṣaṇake
vanake maraḷiduvavaranellara
vanite saṁtaisidaḷu daivava
neneda bhaktariguṁṭe bhayavele nr̥pati kēḷeṁda
kaḷedara0dina rātriyanu ravi
beḷagidanu pūrvādriyali saṁ
daṇisi naḍedaru muṁde kaṁḍaru cēdipaṭṭaṇava
hoḷeva hēmada saudhagaḷa taḷa
taḷipa neleyupparigegaḷa kaṁ
ḍolidu manaharuṣadali hokkaru satisahita purava
rasada lēpada misuniyo malina
vasanadali hudugirda ratnavo
nasida mēghadoḷeseva caṁdrana biṁbadaṁdadali
śaśivadane barutiralu purajana
vosedu nōḍidudalligallige
bisajamukhiyivaḷārenuta beragāytu jananikara
nuḍige śukapika naliye mige seḷe
naḍu baḷuke vr̥ttastanake sō
rmuḍiya bhārake koraḷu koṁkalu mellaḍiyaniḍuta
kuḍitegaṁgaḷa nōṭa kārmugi
loḍedu miṁcuva miṁcinaṁdadi
saḍagaradi barutirdaḷaṁgane hoḷala bīdiyali
hēmadupparigeyali nr̥pasati
kāminiyarōlagadoḷopputa
tāmarasadaḷanayane damayaṁtiyanu tā kaṁḍu
ī mahāsati yāvaḷō su
trāmanarasiyo enuta karesida
ḍā mahiḷe baṁdaḷu nr̥pālana satiya sammukhake
tāye nīnārāva dēśada
rāyanarasiyidēnu ninagī
prāyadali kaḷeguṁdi māsihudēnu pēḷenalu
ā yuvati kaṇṇīrinali pū
rāya śōkadaleṁdaḷā tara
ḷāyatākṣige tanna vr̥ttāṁtavanu bisusuydu
kṣitiyanellava sōtu jūjali
pati banake baṁdennanagalida
mativikaḷatanadiṁda tiruguta baṁde nimmaḍige
hitavarāranu kāṇe nīvē
gatiyenage paradēśiyanu para
hitave puṇyavu rakṣiseṁdaḷu naḷanr̥pana rāṇi
nuḍiya kēḷuta caidyabhūpana
maḍadi nūpura ghalirughalirena
laḍiyiḍuta baṁdappi seraginoḷorasi kaṁbaniya
biḍu vyatheya varabhūṣaṇaṁgaḷa
toḍu dukūlavanuḍu sumālyava
muḍige sērisu taruṇiyeṁdaḷu caidyanr̥panarasi
dēvi nimmupacāravē saṁ
bhāvaneyalā namage bēri
nnāva bhūṣaṇavēke dēsigarāvu nimmaḍiya
sēveyali tānihenu hīnava
nāvu baḷasuvaralla tannanu
kāva hadananu nīve balliriyeṁdaḷā satige
enalu nasunaguteṁdaḷā mā
ninige tammiṁdāgadupahati
ninage pēḷevu hīnakelasava ciṁte bēḍinnu
tanage magaḷu sunītiyākeya
maneyoḷiru sairaṁdhritanadiṁ
danavarata nīneṁdu nēmisi kaḷuhidaḷu manege
cēdibhūpana maḍadi tanna sa
hōdariya suteyeṁdu ballaḷe
mēdiniyoḷivaḷāra satiyeṁdariyadākeyanu
ādarisi salahidaḷu magaḷō
pādiyali damayaṁtiyanu mana
bhēdavillade karuṇadiṁdaṁganeya nr̥panarasi
manada dageyaḍagitu sunītiya
maneyoḷiddaḷu bhēdavillade
anudinadoḷāhāra nidrāṁganeya tānuḷidu
vanajanābhana karuṇadali baṁ
diniyaneṁdige mukhava tōruva
nenuta ciṁtisutirdaḷā varapurada cennigana

āraneya saṁdhi iṁduvadaneyanagali tā mana no0du kārkōṭakana deseyali baṁdu hokkanu niṣadhapati r̥tuparṇanagariyanu
kēḷu kuṁtītanaya niṣadhanr̥
pālanittalu maredu malagida
bālakiya biṭṭaḍaviyali horavaṁṭanā vanava
kālavāvana kīḷu māḍadu
śūlapāṇiye balla naḷa bhū
pālakana vidhiyēnaneṁbenu baṁdanaḍaviyali
vanite malagihaḷō adhairyadi
nenevaḷō daivavanu nidreya
kanasa kaṁḍēḷuvaḷo kāṇade halava haṁbalisi
kanali vidhiyanu baivaḷō kaṁ
baniya surivaḷo śōkadali nija
tanuva biḍuvaḷo kāṁteyeṁtihaḷenuta naḍetaṁda
sutara parareḍegittu naṁbida
satiya taṁdaḍaviyali malagisi
mativikaḷanādenu purākr̥takarmaphalavaise
kṣitiyoḷāruṁṭennavol nija
satige tappida bāhiranuyeṁ
datiśayada śōkadali naḍedanu śivaśivāyenuta
lōkadoḷagaggaḷeya mahipara
nēkaravaroḷagāranollade
nūki tannane olidu kaikoṁḍaḷu sarōjamukhi
ākeyagalida pātakanu tā
nēke dhareyoḷu śivaśivāyeṁ
dā kamalalōcanege marugidanarasa kēḷeṁda
ī pariyoḷatiśōkadiṁda pra
ḷāpisuva naḷanr̥pati heccida
tāpadali kaḍunoṁdu baḷaluta tanna manadoḷage
śrīpatiya nelegoḷisi hr̥dayada
tāpadoḷu barutiralu muṁde sa
mīpadali hutavahana mahimeya ka0ḍanavanīśa
ēnaneṁbenu nr̥pati kiccina
hāniyanu banadoḷage calisuta
bhānumaṁḍalavaḍare musukida hogeya horaḷiyali
kānanavaneḍegoṁḍa daḷḷuri
gānalāpude tarunikara vai
mānikaru naḍanaḍuge beṁdadu sakala vanabhūmi
bidira meḷe dhagadhagise ghana he
bbidiru chaṭachaṭirenalu uriyoḷu
kadaḷigaḷu simisimise tarugaḷanuruhi meḷegaḷali
gadagadise guhegaḷali mr̥gatati
bedari hāyduvu pakṣisaṁkula
uduriduvu garisahita beṁdā vanada madhyadali
tegedu hāyduvu siṁha śārdū
lagaḷu karigaḷa hiṁḍu nānā
mr̥gagaḷagaṇita beṁdu biddavu nimiṣamātradali
cigidu hāyduvu gaṁḍabhēruṁ
ḍagaḷu modalādakhiḷamr̥gapa
kṣigaḷu keḍeduvu kiccinoḷagavanīśa kēḷeṁda
praḷayakāladi suḍuva vaḍabā
naḷanoyenalā vanava suḍutali
suḷisuḷiyutāhāragoḷutiralalli daniyāytu
silukidenu pāvakanoḷennanu
olidu hā nr̥pakulaśirōmaṇi
kaḷedu biḍisai sukr̥ta ninagahudeṁdudā ninada
āgalā danigēḷi nr̥pati sa
rāgadiṁdave baṁdu hokkanu
kūgidavarārenuta barutire kaṁḍanuragapati
pōgutideyennasuvu salahu ṣa
ḍāgamajña nr̥pālayenalā
bhōgiyanu kaṁḍarasa nīnāreṁdu besagoṁḍa
uragapati kārkōṭakanu tā
narasa kēḷī banadoḷirutire
paramar̥ṣi baṁdenna tāgidanaṁdu bhītiyali
karedu koṭṭanu śāpavanu saṁ
carisadaṁtireyenageyidu pari
haravadeṁdige munipa karuṇipudeṁdoḍiṁteṁda
iraliralu kālāṁtarake bhū
varanu naḷanr̥panilligaiduva
dharaṇipana karakamala sōṁkalu śāpavidu baḷika
pariharipudene muniya vacanadi
barava hāruttiralu baṁdai
karuṇadiṁdagniyanu parihariseṁdanuragapati
karuṇadali nr̥pa bhītigoḷḷade
yuragapatiyanu tegeyutanalana
uriya tappisi koḷada tīrake taṁduparicarise
karaviḍidu dharaṇipana kaccida
ḍuravaṇisi viṣavēre nr̥patiya
paramatējada dēha keṭṭitu vikr̥tarūpāgi
doḍḍa hoṭṭeya gūnubennina
aḍḍa mōreya gaṁṭumūgina
doḍḍa kaikālugaḷa udurida rōmamīsegaḷa
jaḍḍu dēhada gujjugoralina
giḍḍa rūpina haruku gaḍḍada
heḍḍanāda kurūpitanadali nr̥pati viṣadiṁda
māranākārada nr̥pālaka
krūrarūpādanu purākr̥ta
mīralāraḷaveṁdu nuḍidanu tanna manadoḷage
tōramāṇikaveṁdu piḍidare
bhūri keṁḍavidāytu śivaśiva
krūrajaṁtugaḷoḍane sakhatana phalisitenageṁda
munna māḍida karmaphalavidu
benna biḍadiraluragapati kē
ḷinnu nōyaladēke tānē pāpiyādenala
pannagāridhvajana kr̥pe tana
ginnu tappida baḷika lōkado
ḷinnu sairisalāra vaśaveṁdenuta marugidanu
ēke nr̥pati vr̥thā manōvyathe
kākabaḷasalu bēḍa nīnavi
vēkiyē sākinnu ninagupakāravaṁjadiru
lōka ninnanu kāṇadaṁtira
bēkenutalēriside garaḷava
nēkavupakāraṁgaḷahavadariṁda ninageṁda
garaḷavidu sarvāṁgadali saṁ
carisutiha pariyaṁta ripugaḷa
śarajalāgnibhujaṁgarōgādigaḷa bhayavilla
nirutavidu vajrāṁgi bēḍi
nnarasa ciṁtisabēḍa kāryada
horege tānidu bēre bhaya bēḍinnu ninageṁda
janapa kēḷai dharege r̥tupa
rṇanu mahārājēṁdra guṇanidhi
yinakulāṁbudhi caṁdranātana puravayōdhyeyadu
ninage bahudakṣahr̥dayavu ā
tanali nīnavagaśva hr̥dayava
nanugoḷisu sākinnu ciṁtisabēḍa hōgeṁda
poḍavipananōlaisu vāgheya
piḍidu bāhukaneṁba nāmadi
naḍesu rathavanu hīnavr̥ttiyadalla ninaginnu
biḍade munnina rūpu bēkā
daḍe nenevudā pakṣigaḷa ha
ccaḍavanīvuvu dharisalaḍaguvudī kurūpitana
ninna havaṇē pūrvādali bhi
kṣānnavanu bēḍidanu paśupati
pannagāridhvajanu kāydanu paśugaḷaḍaviyali
unnataiśvaryapradanu śata
manyu banadali naveyanē sā
kinnu mananōyadiru cittaiseṁdanuragapati
paramasatyavratadoḷā pu
ṣkarana gelidunnatada rājyada
siri migalu sāmrājyavāḷuve ninna satisahita
varavanittenu ninageyeṁdupa
carisi kārkōṭakanu naḷanr̥pa
garuhutākṣaṇa māyavādanu rāya kēḷeṁda
balida ciṁteya manada duguḍada
naḷanr̥pati kānanadi barutire
maletu tolagada duṣṭamr̥gagaḷa kaṁḍu nasunaguta
halavu giriguhe gahvaraṁgaḷa
kaḷedu muṁdaṇa janapadaṁgaḷa
baḷiviḍidu naḍetaṁdanalasade halavu yōjanava
hariva nadigaḷa vanataṭākada
varakusuma malligeya banagaḷa
purada prāṁtadoḷeseva keṁdāvareya koḷagaḷanu
urutarada pānīyaśāleya
maragaḷiṁdatimereva rājyava
dharaṇipati saṁtasadi nōḍuta baṁdanāyeḍege
dhagadhagipa kōṭāvaḷiya hoga
ruguva hēmada kottaḷaṁgaḷa
gaganavanu cuṁbisuva tenegaḷa sāluratnagaḷa
sogasuvāḷvērigaḷa suttiri
vagaḷa ghātavanāru ballaru
bigida vajrakavāṭavesedudu dikkudikkinali
hoḷeva misuniya ratnanicayada
neleneleya saudhāgradali pra
jvalipa hēmada kalaśagaḷa ravicaṁdraśālegaḷa
lalaneyara nānā vinōdada
halavu gōpuraśikharadagaṇita
neleya varṇisalaridayōdhyāpuravu raṁjisitu
arasugaḷu bhūsuraru mige vai
śyaru caturtharu nāgarikada
purajanaru saṁdaṇisitagaṇita rājavīdhiyali
kari turaga ratha pāyadaḷa gō
carisitaṁgaḍi navavidhānadi
merevayōdhyāpurava kaṁḍanu tūgidanu śirava
baṁdu hokkanu purava merevati
caṁdavanu nerenōḍi manadoḷa
gaṁdu koṁḍāḍidanu r̥tuparṇana mahāsiriya
taṁdudē vidhi tannanillige
maṁdabhāgyanu tānenuta mana
noṁdu nenedanu varapurādhipa cennakēśavana

ēḷaneya saṁdhi magaḷa kāṇade bhīmanr̥pa mū jagava bhēdisi caidyabhūpana nagaradallire kaṁḍu karesida tanna nijasuteya
kēḷu dharmaja ratna nirmita
dālayada sobaginaliyōlaga
śāleyali r̥tuparṇaniddanu siṁhapīṭhadali
sāla makuṭada nr̥paru bhūsura
jāla maṁtri purōhitaru guṇa
śīlarunnatasatiyariṁdesedirdudāsthāna
idu samaya tanageṁdu naḷanr̥pa
mudadi vēṣava tāḷdu hariyaṁ
dadali baṁdanu sabheya kaṁḍanu nr̥page kaimugidu
sadamalāsthānadali ripubhaṭa
kadanagaligaḷu jīyenalu naya
hr̥dayadali binnaisidanu r̥tuparṇabhūpatige
avanipati kēḷ nimma padakama
lavanu bhajisuve jīya cittadi
savaḍinuḍi tanagilla bāhukaneṁbudabhidhāna
bhuvanadoḷu tānaśvakulahr̥da
yavanu ballenu śākapākadi
savigoḷipa varavidye tanaguṁṭeṁdanava naguta
sūpakāradoḷaggaḷanu kaḍu
rūpinava tānalla cittadi
kāpuruṣanennadiru nōḍā tanna pauruṣava
bhūpa muṁgaigaṁkaṇake kula
dīpa kannaḍiyēke tarisu pra
tāpavājiyaneṁdu binnaisidanu nasunaguta
poḍavipati r̥tuparṇa bāhuka
nuḍida vacanake mecci manadu
ggaḍada tējiya tarisi koḍalēridanu bīdiyali
maḍada sannege kuṇidu ravegā
liḍuta jōḍaṇeyiṁda hayavaḍi
gaḍige cimmitu vāyuvēgadoḷarasa kēḷeṁda
karada vāgheya saḍila biḍe ni
bbarada gamanadoḷaiditavaniyo
ḷuravaṇisi keṁdhūḷi musukidudaṁbarava biḍade
dharaṇi tallaṇisidudu gaganadi
suraru koṁḍāḍidaru rāvuta
rarasanahudō bhāpu bhāpeṁdudu samastajana
muruhi hiḍiyalu maḍada sannege
tirugitativēgadali hayavō
sarisi kirubemariḍalu nilisuta vāruvavaniḷidu
karava mugiyalu nr̥pati meccuta
tarisi koṭṭanu bhūṣaṇaṁgaḷa
hiridu saṁbaḷavittu nilisidanarasa bāhukana
janapa kēḷ bāhukanu vālā
khyanali sakhyava beḷesutātana
nanudinavu kūḍirdanoṁdānoṁdudina rātri
vanajamukhi damayaṁtiyoḷu cuṁ
bana sarasa sallāpadiṁdiha
kanasa kaṁḍeccaradi kāṇade satige halubidanu
hā taruṇi naḷinākṣi nayasu
prītipūrvakadiṁda kanasali
mātudōride baṁdu nannali karuṇadiṁ nīnu
dhātuguṁdidenakaṭa asurā
rāti ballanenuta manadali
kātarisi nijasatige halubida madananesugeyali
vikaḷavanu vālākhya kēḷidu

rāya meccida sārathiya biru

muṁde kaṁḍanu barutalaḍaviyo
ḷoṁdu tāreya marananadaroḷu
saṁda phalaparṇaṁgaḷeṇisade sūta pēḷenalu
iṁdenage matidōradavanipa
kuṁdadenisida pēḷu nīnena
geṁdoḍā sārathige lekkavanaruhidanu nr̥pati
iḷidu rathavanu baṁdu vr̥kṣada
baḷige niṁdā śākhegaḷaliha
phalada parṇaṁgaḷeṇisidanā padyasaṁkhyeyali
olidu lekkava kaṁḍu tā mana
nalidu naḷanr̥pa puṣkarana tā
deluva hadanāytenuta bare kalipuruṣanidirāda
ele nr̥pālaka ninna satyada
neleyanīkṣisabēkenuta baṁ
daḷaliside hiridāgi nōyadirinnu cittadali
tolagidenu iṁdinali śubhamaṁ
gaḷakaravu nanagappudenalā
naḷanr̥pati khatigoṁḍu śāpava koḍade mannisida
mānavādhipa kēḷu lōkake
dīnajanabāṁdhavanu naḷanr̥pa
kānanadoḷavanatta kaḷuhisi baṁdu rathavēri
ā narēṁdra0gaśvahr̥dayava
tānaruhi ātanali paḍedanu
sānurāgadi bhūruhada hr̥dayavanu nimiṣadali
karada vāgheya koṁḍu nr̥page
ccarisi nūkida tējigaḷu hūṁ
karisi mana muṁkoṁḍu hāydudu biṭṭa sūṭiyali
bharada gamanavanēnaneṁbenu
nereda janavallalli niṁdudu
dhareyoḷī sārathige sariyārarasa kēḷeṁda
turagahēṣāravada gāliya
dharadhurada cītkr̥tiya sārathi
yuravaṇeya rathadaccugaḷa jhēṁkāranādadali
bharadi keṁdhūḷiḍuta baralā
purajanaru saṁdaṇisi nōḍalu
paricararu baṁdaru vidarbhanr̥pālagaruhidaru
ba0danē r̥tuparṇanenutā
naṁda mige karesidanu sacivara
maṁdiyanu kaḷuhisalu karetaṁdaru nijālayake
saṁdaṇiya pariharisi nr̥pa muda
diṁda bēraramaneyoḷulupega
ḷiṁdayōdhyāpatiya satkarisidanu bhīmanr̥pa
kēḷidaḷu damayaṁti vārteya
tāḷidaḷu haruṣavanu manadali
phālalōcanadiṁda phalisitu puṇyavenagiṁdu
bāle kēḷenagiṁdu śōka
jvāle pariharavāytu maṁgaḷa
dēḷigeyu pasarisitu śubhakaraveṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
khinnanādanu cittadali r̥tu
parṇa bhūsuraneṁda mātina
binnaṇake maruḷāgi baṁdenu mūḍhanādenala
bhinnavillade koṁḍa nācike
ginnu hadanēnenuta guṇasaṁ
panna marugida tanna manada duraṁtaciṁteyali
ōlagavanittanu vidarbhanr̥
pāla karesida maṁtri bāṁdhava
jālavanu r̥tuparṇa baṁdanu bāhukanu sahita
sālamaṇipīṭhadali kuḷḷire
bāleyara saṁgītanr̥tyada
kēḷamēḷadi raṁjisitu bhūpālanāsthāna
nāriyara maregoṁḍu sabheyali
sārathiya kubjāvatārava
nōregaṇṇinoḷīkṣisuta damayaṁti manadoḷage
ārivanu naḷanr̥pana hōluva
cārucinnegaḷilla tōrke vi
kāravāgide rūpenuta ciṁtisidaḷiṁdumukhi
oredoredu nōḍidaḷu sūtana
sirimogada kāṁtiyanu kaḷeguṁ
diruva kāyava kappiniṁdudurirda rōmadali
parikisalkī rūpu kaikoṁ
ḍiruvanē naḷanr̥pati śivaśiva
muraharanu tā ballaneṁdummaḷisidaḷu taraḷe
haredudōlagavalli nijamaṁ
dirake baṁdālōcisuva mige
taruṇiyara kaḷuhisalu baṁdaru bāṇasina manege
irava kaṁḍaru pākadali kai
karaṇavanu nere sūpakārana
pariya hogaḷuta baṁdu binnaisidaḷu bhāminige
tāye cittaisinnavana kara
ṇāyatanavēneṁbe lōkada
strīyaroḷaginnilla racisuva śākapākadali
māyavanu mige tiḷiyalariyadu
pāyaṁdidīkṣisalu sakala ra
sāyanavu paripakvavāgide pēḷalariyademage
dādiyaru bāhukana guṇagaḷa
bhēdisidaroṁdoṁdu bageya ta
ḷōdarige binnaise niścaisidaḷu damayaṁti
ādaḍava naḷanahudu guṇadali
bhēdisuveninnommeyenuta vi
nōdadiṁdāḍuva kumārara tarisidaḷu taruṇi
taraḷarige nīreredu kāṁcana
varadukūlavanittu divyā
bharaṇabhūṣitarāda tanayara dādiyara kaiya
piridu kaḷuhalu bāṇasina maṁ
dirada bāgila muṁde biḍe saṁ
carisi suḷidāḍuvara kaṁḍanu nr̥pati haruṣisuta
taraḷaranu piḍidetti toḍeyoḷa
girisi muddāḍidanu nōḍuta
suriva kaṁbanigaḷali bāhuka marugutiralaṁdu
mareya jālaṁdhradali kaṁḍaḷu
taruṇi naḷanr̥panītanahudeṁ
durutarada prēmadali baṁdaḷu jananiyaramanege
tāye saṁśayavilla naiṣadha
rāyanītanu sūtanalla vi
ḍāyadali baṁdihanu nōḍu kurūpivēṣadali
rāyaroḷagaggaḷeya naḷanr̥pa
māyavanu tōrihanu ivana ni
jāyatava tā balle kareseṁdaḷu sarōjamukhi
dharaṇipatiyanumatadoḷātana
karesidaḷu nr̥panarasi bāhuka
nirade baṁdanu rājamaṁdiradali kuḷḷiralu
taraḷe māsida sīreyali gara
garike tappida celuvinali niṁ
diralu kaṁḍanu satiya talebāgidanu lajjeyali
himakarānvayatilaka vasudhā
ramaṇa puṇyōdaya subhāṣita
vimalaguṇa cāritrasannuta satyasaṁcāra
kumati puṣkara munidanē vi
kramadaridrate baṁdudē sā
kamitabhujabala pāliseṁdaḷu patige damayaṁti
munna māḍida karmaphala r̥tu
parṇanali sēveyanu māḍuvu
dunnatikeyali baṁdudē mige sārvabhaumarige
tanna puṇyada hāni tānida
kinnu baḷaluvudēnu guṇasaṁ
panna rakṣisu satiyaneṁderagidaḷu padayugake
turuba hiḍidettidanu satiyaḷa
suriva kaṁbanidoḍedu nuḍidanu
baride ciṁtisalēke mānini biḍu manōvyatheya
ariyadavaḷēṁ nīnu lōkada
sarasijākṣiyarellarige vara
guruvalā baridenna bayasalu bēḍa hōgeṁda
vinayahīnanu tānu manadali
nenedu tappida nirdayanu kā
nanadi ninnanu bisuṭu kaḷeda durātma bāhirana
nenevarē biḍu maruḷe ninagiṁ
dinali māḷpapunassvayaṁvara
manake saribaṁdavana nīnoliseṁdanā nr̥pati
enalu karṇaṁgaḷige sabaḷada
monegaḷiridaṁtāge sati ka
ṇṇinali tuṁbidaḷudakavanu harahara śivāyenuta
enageyinnupunassvayaṁvara
manadoḷuṁṭē nīvu barabē
kenuta vārteya kalpiside kēḷeṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
naṁbidenu lēsāgi manadoḷa
giṁbugoṁḍudu vikr̥tirūpina
ḍoṁbiyēkidu sakaladharmavicāravaṁtarige
aṁbujākṣana rūpinali prati
biṁbavallade nīvu bayalā
ḍaṁbarada nuḍiyēke sākinneṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
naḍeyuteḍahida paṭṭadāneya
piḍidu kolluvaruṁṭe naṁbida
maḍadiyallave tānu birunuḍiyēke naḷanr̥pati
aḍaviyali kaḍunoṁdu dēhava
biḍadeyuḷuhideninnu prāṇada
goḍaveyinnēkenuta kaṁbaniduṁbidaḷu taraḷe
nōye noṁdiha satiyanāḍalu
nyāyavēnidu nimage kēḷele
rāya nimmanu nōḍe kaḷuhida carara dikkinali
māyarūpida kāṇalārade
bāya biḍutiralinnayōdhyeya
rāyanali nūtanada sārathiyenalu kēḷidenu
āga bhūsurapati sudēvana
bēgalaṭṭide nimma baḷige sa
rāgadiṁduttarake pratyuttarava pēḷdirala
īgalidu saṁśayave tānada
kāgi karesi svayaṁvarava nima
gāgi pēḷidenidara tappēneṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
jananutane kēḷādiyali yau
vanava ninagoppisidenallade
tanumanōvākkāyakarmaṁgaḷali tāneraḍa
ninage nenedavaḷalla nīnē
nanage gatiye0dihudanariyā
janapa rakṣisu kaipiḍidu salaheṁdaḷiṁdumukhi
idake yama varuṇānilēṁdraru
madanajanakane sākṣiyene mē
ghadali nuḍidanu vāyu naḷanr̥panoḍane satyavanu
cadura kēḷ damayaṁti lōkada
sudatiyē tiḷi lōkapāvane
yidake saṁśayavēke pālisu satiya nīneṁdu
pavananāḍida nuḍiya kaikoṁ
ḍavanipati binnaisidanu kai
tavakadali kaliyiṁda noṁdenu nimma daruśanadi
bavaṇe hiṁgi kr̥tārthanādenu
bhuviyoḷinnēnenuta pakṣiya
havaṇa manadali neneye baṁdudu divyamayavasana
dharisidanu naḷanā dukūlava
pariharisitā rūpu munnina
paramatējada divyatanuvinoḷesedu raṁjisalu
surara duṁdubhi moḷage mallige
yarala maḷe sūsidaru gaganadi
surasatiyarakṣateya taḷidaru harasi naḷanr̥pege
suraru koṁḍāḍidaru yama bhā
skara viriṁcādigaḷuliye vara
taruṇi baṁderagidaḷu patiyaṁghriyali damayaṁti
haruṣadali bigiyappidanu bhū
suraru saṁbhramisidaru varapura
darasa cennigarāya salahidanavara karuṇadali

oṁbattaneya saṁdhi kadanadali puṣkarana balavanu sadedu jūjiṁ gelidu rājyava mudadi pālisutirdanā satisahita naḷanr̥pati
kēḷu pāṁḍukumāra naḷabhū
pālanabhyudayavanu maṁgaḷa
dēḷigeyanēneṁbe damayaṁtiya mahōtsavava
līleyali majjanava māḍi du
kūlamaṇibhūṣaṇava dharisi ca
ḍāḷisuva kāṁtiyali siṁhāsanadi kuḷḷirda
ītanāru pitāmahano puru
hūtanō manmathanō lakṣmī
nāthano caṁdramano śaṁkaranō mahādēva
ītanē naḷanr̥pati bhūvi
khyātanelliṁdilli baṁdanu
pūtu majharē enuta koṁḍāḍitu nr̥pastōma
baṁdu kaṁḍudu nikhiḷapurajana
vaṁdu kāṇikegoṭṭu mudadali
saṁdaṇise r̥tuparṇa baṁdanu maṁtrijanasahita
saṁda maṇikāṁcana suvastuva
taṁdu samukhadoḷirisi vinayadi
niṁdu binnaisidanu karagaḷa mugidu naḷanr̥page
sōmakula nr̥pasārvabhauma sa
nāma maṁgaḷaniḷaya jitasaṁ
grāma dhīra virōdhisāmajasiṁha dayāśīla
tāmasanu matigēḍi mānava
pāmarana guṇadōṣaveṇisade
prēmadiṁdolidenna nī salaheṁdu kaimugida
rūḍhiyali nā nimmanariyada
mūḍhamatiyavivēki turagava
hūḍidāgale rathake ādiyoḷaridenē tānu
māḍidaparādhagaḷanoṁdanu
nōḍalāgadu cittadali khaya
khōḍiyillade salahabēkeṁderagidanu padake
ī pariyoḷenalā nr̥pana saṁ
tāpavanu pariharisi naḷanr̥pa
tā piridu maṇibhūṣaṇaṁgaḷanittu nasunaguta
kōpavinisilleṁdayōdhyā
bhūpananu mannisuva samayadi
tāpasaranoḍagoṁḍu baṁdanu olidu maitrēya
baṁda munigavanīśa caraṇa
dvaṁdvadali cācidanu makuṭava
naṁdu piḍidettidanu nasunagutalli kuḷḷirda
eṁdanele naḷanr̥pati ninage mu
kuṁdanolumeyu āva kāladi
saṁdiraluyinnāvudaridilleṁdanā munipa
kalipuruṣaniṁdādudupahati
lalane putraranagali kaṣṭava
baḷasideyalā noṁdu satyava biḍade saṁcarisi
sulabhanāde kulāṁganeya vrata
phalada puṇyōdayadi nijasiri
phalisitinnī lōkadali ninagāru sariyeṁda
hariya nelegeḍisidanu paramē
śvarana bhikṣavanettisida sara
siruhabhava tā śirava pōgāḍidanu pūrvadali
karuṇahīnanu ninna sōṁkalu
terana kāṇade halavu dina kā
tarisi chaladali toḍacibiṭṭanu manada bhītiyali
ella nr̥paraṁtalla lakṣmī
vallabhana pratibiṁba ninnali
nillaballane kalipuruṣanati bēga teraḷidanu
sallalita sāmrājyapadaviṁ
della ninagahudeṁdu dharaṇī
vallabhana satkarisi koṁḍāḍidanu maitrēya
eṁdu harasidanavanipage muda
diṁda maṁtrākṣategaḷali muni
vr̥ṁda saṁtōṣisitu nr̥pa siṁhāsanadoḷiralu
iṁduvadaneyarāratiya nala
viṁdalettidaralli satiyaru
saṁdaṇisi pāḍidaru śōbhānavanu manavolidu
ūdiduvu kahaḷegaḷu śaṁkhavu
nādisitu bhērī mr̥daṁga vi
nōdadiṁ raṁjisitu nānā vādyarabhasadali
mēdinīśvararāga muygaḷa
nōdisidaravanipage satigi
nnaidetana migaleṁdu harasitu munivadhūnikara
arasa kēḷu vidarbhapati muni
varanupacarisidanu dharaṇī
surarigittanu gōhiraṇya suvastudānavanu
karesi koṭṭanu nr̥patigakhilā
bharaṇagaḷa kari turaga rathavanu
purajanara saṁtaisi kaḷuhidanakhiḷabāṁdhavara
haredudōlagavalli yācaka
vararu koṁḍāḍidaru dharaṇī
śvararu kaḷuhisikoṁḍu hokkaru tammanagarigaḷa
marudivasa r̥tuparṇa naḷanr̥pa
geragi kaḷuhisikoṁḍayōdhyā
purava hokkanu caidyabhūpati maraḷidanu purake
iṁdumukhi damayaṁtiyoḍanā
naṁdadali naḷanr̥pati māvana
maṁdiradi tānoṁdu vatsaraviddavibhavadali
muṁde nammaya niṣadhapurigā
viṁdu gamisalu bēkenuta tā
naṁdu bhīmanr̥pālanoḍanālōcisida hadana
daṁḍu naḍeyali niṣadhapurigā
bhaṁḍa nr̥pa puṣkarana mātē
naṁḍaledu phalavilla sākinnēḷiyeṁdenuta
maṁḍalādhipanenalu bhūpara
taṁḍaveddudu kūḍe bhaṭaru
ddaṁḍa kaiduva koṁḍu naḍedaru naḷana sanneyali
turaga hallaṇisidudu ratha mō
harisi teraḷitu saṁgarake mada
karigaḷiṭṭaṇisidudu kālāḷirade saṁdaṇise
nenedudagaṇita sainya sāgara
morevavōl gaṁbhīrabhēriga
ḷuravaṇise horavaṁṭa naḷanr̥panarasa kēḷeṁda
turagacaya veṁṭaṇisi hūḍida
vararathake balava0du kaiduva
dharisiyēridanarasa maṁgaḷavādyarabhasadali
teraḷitalli mahāratharu saṁ
harake muṁcuva bhaṭara gaḍaṇadi
dhurake naḍedaru muṁde sāruta gaurugahaḷeyali
idu kaṇā naḷanaṁdu vanavā
sada payaṇavādalli makkaḷa
paduḷadiṁdērisi vidarbhake kaḷuhibiṭṭa ratha
gadagadipa navaratnanicayadedo
ḷudisi mereva suvarṇakalaśava
madana nelevīḍenisi meredudu varavarūthavadu
hoḷeva siṁdhada sāla jhallari
gaḷa patākada chatra camarā
vaḷigaḷiṁdali dhātuguṁdidudabhrataḷa musuki
ulida maṁgaḷapāṭhakara kaḷa
kaḷike mige hebbala chaḍāḷise
nela biriyalaitaṁdu biṭṭudu niṣadhanagariyali
dāḷiyiṭṭaru haridu dikkina
mūleyavaraṁjidaru mummone
yāḷu kavidudu hiḍidaraggada sereya sūregaḷa
kēḷidanu puṣkaranu niṣadhana
dāḷi barutide khatiya bharadali
kāḷagake naḷanr̥pati baṁdanenuta muḷidedda
āgalidakēnīga rājyava
nīgidaḷalinoḷomme kadanake
tāgidanu tappēnu barahēḷemma sainikara
īgalītana kaḍidu seregaḷa
bēga hiḍiyeṁdenuta nijabala
sāgarava nerahidanu kaḷuhida tanna daḷapatiya
harige khaḍga kaṭhāri tōmara
paraśu mudgara kuṁta balleha
parigha cakra triśūla kakkaḍa bhiṁḍivāḷacaya
suragi sabaḷa musuṁḍi modalā
durutarada kaidugaḷa paṭubhaṭa
ruravaṇisi tāgidaru ripumōharavananugoḷisi
hokkarāhavadoḷage moneya
llikkalisi bare kaṁḍu majharē
cukkigaḷirā enuta hoydaru berasi paṭubhaṭara
ikkidaru suragiyali karigaḷa
tikki tividaru tērugaḷa muri
dikki parighadoḷorasidaru kālāḷa mūdalisi
iṭṭaṇisi bare tējigaḷa nere
kaṭṭi khaṁḍisi bhaṭaranā be
nnaṭṭi kaḍidaru berasi baha balu vīranāyakara
hoṭṭuguṭṭidararuṇajala sā
liṭṭudavaniyoḷamama nere jaga
jaṭṭigaḷu kādidaru raṇadali suraru beragāge
sārathiyaneccarisi rathikaru
tōridaru kaiguṇava saraḷina
sāradali ripubhaṭara talegaḷa taridarallalli
kāridaru rakutavanu tērina
vāruvaṁgaḷu muggiduvu raṇa
dhīrareccāḍidaru gāyadoḷoralitubhayabala
keḍeda talegaḷa siḍida hubbina
kaḍida tōḷgaḷa neggidelugaḷa
uḍida toḍegaḷa miduḷa khaṁḍada harida karuḷugaḷa
oḍeda nettigaḷiṁda rakutada
maḍu hariye taraharisalārade
paḍemuridu barutiralu kaṁḍanu khātiyoḷu naḷanu
karedu sārathigaruhidanu pu
ṣkarana bala kaimīri barutire
tiruhu tējiyanittalivadiranorasi benninali
karuḷa tegevenenuta cāpake
tiruvanērisi saraḷinali bo
bbiriye dhare tallaṇisitavanīpāla kēḷeṁda
murida bala saṁvarisikoṁḍudu
moreva kahaḷāravada sanneyo
ḷurubitā baladoḷage berasitu naḷana parivāra
arasanā samayadali hūḍida
saraḷa kennege sēdi biḍe ka
ttarisi bisuṭudu ripunr̥para śiragaḷanu khaṁḍisuta
iḷe saraḷamayavāytu keṁḍada
maḷe karedudene puṣkarana bala
doḷage biddudanēkaripunr̥pasainya sāgaravu
maletavara śiragaḷanu khaṁḍisi
taleya ceṁḍāḍidaru rathikaru
balugudure kālāḷu neggitu naḷana śarahatige
terahugoṭṭoḷahogisi sadedanu
barasiḍilu baḍivaṁte ripubala
muridu niṁdudu gāyavaḍedaru vīrapaṭubhaṭaru
huriyoḍedu maidegedu sale kai
muriye kaiduva bisuṭu paḍe moga
diruhaleccanu koccidanu puṣkaracaturbalava
gāḷi muridaukidaḍe ghanamē
ghāḷi niluvude niṣadhapati śara
jāladali kaḍivaḍedu biddaru rāyarāvutaru
āḷu muridudu kaṁḍa mukhadali
hēḷalēnānavara vidhiyanu
sōladali managuṁdi hāydaru biṭṭa maṁḍeyali
āru sāsira tērugaḷu hadi
nārusāsira karigaḷippa
ttārusāvira turaga kālāḷoṁdu lakṣadali
sēritaṁtakapurige saraḷina
sāradali ripusēne muridudu
āru ballaru mikka sēneyanarasa kēḷeṁda
marana huttavanēridaru saṁ
garadi kaiduva bisuṭu sale mai
maredu tējiyaniḷidu rāvtaru koraḷa salahenuta
karava mugidaru jōdararu kai

nnaramanege karetaṁdanā kali

ḷḷiralu taṁdaru sārigaḷanirisidaru sammukhadi
